description_long: This triumphal arch is a grand stone structure featuring a large central archway flanked by robust pilasters and topped with a classical pediment. The facade is richly detailed, with a prominent sculpted relief panel above the arch, possibly depicting a historical or allegorical scene. The stonework is textured and weathered, giving the structure an aged, monumental appearance. The sides of the arch are solid and unadorned, emphasizing the depth and mass of the construction. The rear of the arch is simpler, lacking the ornate reliefs and decorative elements seen on the front. A small doorway is visible at the base, suggesting access to an interior or maintenance area.
description: A monumental stone triumphal arch with a large central archway, ornate reliefs, and classical architectural details. The front is richly decorated, while the sides and rear are more austere.
description_view_0: The front view displays the ornate facade with a large archway, sculpted relief panel, pilasters, and a small doorway at the base.
description_view_1: The left side view shows the solid, thick profile of the arch with stepped architectural detailing and no visible ornamentation.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals a plain surface with the central archway open, lacking the decorative elements of the front.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the stepped profile and solid stone construction.
